phase-plan.purpose: Lock the reopened Phase 50 Definition of Done to product behavior: working chat-driven authoring inside Space Explorer, powered by Codex, producing canonical assets and serializable content bundles.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: DoD lock and task expansion for implementation (50-08..50-12). Out of scope: declaring phase complete before in-product verification.

task.description: Reopen Phase 50 in ROADMAP/STATE and align task graph with product-level DoD.
Define executable implementation slices 50-08..50-12 to deliver DoD behavior.

dod.criterion: Space Explorer exposes a usable in-app chat interface for authoring workflows.
Chat is Codex-backed and can discuss models, stats, and content schema with context-aware replies.
Chat actions can create/update model/stat/schema content safely via validated mutation paths.
Chat workflow can create/update canonical data assets linked to model/content bindings.
Authored output serializes to content-bundle payloads consumed by runtime, not schema-only docs.
End-to-end verification demonstrates chat -> mutation -> canonical asset -> bundle serialization path in Space Explorer.

suggestion.gap: Current requirements do not explicitly require in-Space-Explorer conversational authoring and end-to-end bundle-producing output.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement: AI authoring in Space Explorer must support conversational edits of models/stats/schema and produce canonical assets plus serializable content-bundle outputs.

suggestion.gap: Current requirements do not enforce an end-to-end acceptance test for chat-driven authoring.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement: release gate must include deterministic E2E verification for chat-authoring flow from prompt to bundle artifact generation.
